sharedStateObservations.observation: DemoModeBanner component is the standard visible fallback indicator for surfaces showing demo/snapshot data instead of live Supabase data. All dashboard and cockpit surfaces must use it when in demo mode.

summary: Replaced silent mixed demo/live reads across dashboard, cockpit, sidebar, and org chart hooks with explicit company-scoped Supabase queries. Added visible DemoModeBanner component. 10 new tests verify company scoping across all 7 shared data hooks and demo banner visibility. Solid implementation with no regressions.
